title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Hindustan Unilever - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Hindustan Unilever has an exciting opening for a Manufacturing Engineer at our Jabalpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Hindustan Unilever:
Hindustan Unilever is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
